{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603210116145F8E3E7425F4EB2EBAF3"}"},"total":736},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7451478850444051224","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书描述人物形象精辟，打斗场面更是让人感觉有一种实实在在。对叶辰故事的描述刻划达到了登峰造极，故事情节对主人公爰国爱民的情景表现的淋离尽智。[赞][赞][爱心][爱心][伤心][伤心][KISS][KISS][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][爱心][爱心][爱心][伤心][KISS][KISS][OK][OK][重拳出击][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]","text_exts":[{"e":160,"s":156,"text":"重拳出击","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774026974EB2EBAF3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227451478850444051224%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227141270146995194913%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734937519,"group_id":"7141270146995194913","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11NdQtw8srtdSrE5+K+3nY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"101877604111","user_name":"危险重重的尹堂曜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101877604111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7141270146995194913","book_info":{"abstract":"【出狱流+下山流+神医流+战神流+校花流】
从小在幽魂监狱中长大的叶辰，下山寻找自己的未婚妻，掀开了尘封已久的漩涡……
任你们千般阴谋，万般手段，我叶辰何惧？
因为我在监狱继承了上百个师父的通天本领——
大师父是无上天师，究天人之际，通古今之变！
二师父是冰冷杀手，十步杀一人，千里不留行！
三师父是镇国战神，守一方疆土，护万世平安！
四师父是至尊修士，修为惊天地，术法泣鬼神！
五师父是绝世神医，银针起死人，丹药肉白骨！
六师父是世界首富，翻手可为云，覆手可为雨！
……
这世界，注定因我的归来而颤抖……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/58fbc7f2fc2afebc370d750764cc4aa7","author":"盛世狼烟","author_id":"","book_id":"7141270146995194913","book_name":"六岁被判25年！出狱人间无敌！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7143077632131891724","read_count":"23556","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3837237"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1780","tags":"都市修真,都市,战神赘婿,多女主,校花,大小姐,打脸,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e1f4b63debaf841cc4707c73dfddd35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779210974&x-signature=IGu%2FxuBp5sgFht8fYpRknGWLHeo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54415191716","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1073"},"
